en-US.meta_description: Redeem a promo code for 40 Below on the App Store.
en-US.title: Redeem your promo code
en-US.intro: Congratulations, you have been given a rare gift: a bespoke, artisanal promo code for a bespoke, artisanal app. Enjoy!
en-US.fallback_cta: Get 40 Below on the App Store
en-US.missing_message: Oh no! This page was built to give people promo codes for 40 Below, but the promo code is missing. You can still get 40 Below, but it won't be free. Sorry about that!
en-US.malformed_message: Oh no! This page was built to give people promo codes for 40 Below, but the promo code is wrong somehow. You can still get 40 Below, but it won't be free. Sorry about that!
